question: When was XYZ Corporation founded and by whom?
answer: XYZ Corporation was founded in 2001 by CEO, Jane Smith
answer_paragraph: XYZ Corporation was founded in 2001 by CEO, Jane Smith, with the mission to provide innovative solutions to the tech industry. Over the years, we have grown to become a leading player, with offices in New York, London, and Tokyo. Our core values are innovation, integrity, and teamwork.

question: What are the locations and contact numbers of the company offices?
answer_paragraph:
Office Location Address Contact Number
New York 123 Main Street, NY 10001 (123) 456-7890
London 456 Oxford Street, London W1A 1AA (020) 7123-4567
Tokyo 789 Shinjuku, Tokyo 160-0023 (03) 4567-8901

question: What benefits does the company offer to its employees?
answer: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage, 401(k) plan with company match, and paid time off
answer_paragraph:
Benefit Description Eligibility
Health Insurance Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage All full-time employees
Retirement Plan 401(k) plan with company match All full-time employees after 1 year of service
Paid Time Off 15 days per year, plus 10 holidays All full-time employees

question: What are the company policies that employees are expected to adhere to?
answer: Code of conduct, social media policy, and data protection policy
answer_paragraph:
Policy Description Location
Code of Conduct Outlines expected behavior and ethics Company intranet
Social Media Policy Guidelines for social media use Company intranet
Data Protection Policy Procedures for handling sensitive data Company intranet

question: How often are performance evaluations conducted and what is their purpose?
answer: Every 6 months, to assess progress and set goals
answer_paragraph:
Evaluation Cycle Frequency Purpose
6-Month Review Every 6 months To assess progress and set goals
Annual Review Every 12 months To evaluate overall performance and determine salary increases

question: What training programs does the company offer to its employees?
answer: Leadership development, technical skills training, and soft skills training
answer_paragraph:
Training Program Description Duration
Leadership Development Develops leadership skills and knowledge 6 months
Technical Skills Training Enhances technical skills and knowledge 3 months
Soft Skills Training Develops communication, teamwork, and time management skills 2 months
